title: Marks. The world's first Brand Creation Platform.

designCharacteristics.typography: Custom/system fonts, heavy use of SVG text for hero headlines
animations: Rotating photo grid in contact section
interactivity: Carousel with prev/next navigation for case studies
Pillar hover/click to reveal overlay panels
designCharacteristics.layout: Full-viewport sections with parallax, split-layouts, and grid-based decorative elements
designCharacteristics.technology: Astro v5.10.1, Mux video streaming, DatoCMS for images, Netlify hosting
